message:
fix(close): restore IssueType import needed by close guard logic

Another agent's concurrent change re-adds the IssueType import to close.rs.
The close guard dynamically checks issue.issue_type to pick the "epic" vs
"parent issue" label, so the import is required at runtime even though the
enum variant is not pattern-matched directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
